title: Gate wheel: the 64 gates on the tropical zodiac
description: The King Wen gates arranged around the tropical zodiac (the Human Design / Gene Keys mandala) as structural fact. Each gate spans a 5.625 degree arc of ecliptic longitude; the wheel is anchored with gate 41 beginning at 2 degrees Aquarius. Gate numbers share the King Wen numbering with hexagrams.json. This schema describes the substrate; examples/validate.py enforces the partition and arc invariants.

anchor.description: The wheel anchor. Gate 41 begins the wheel at 2 degrees Aquarius (302 degrees ecliptic longitude); 5.625 degrees per gate, 0.9375 per line, running in zodiacal order. Matches profile.json computation.gateWheelAnchor in the downstream stack.

gate.description: King Wen gate number. Joins hexagrams.json on id. Every gate 1 to 64 appears exactly once; examples/validate.py enforces the partition.

wheelPosition.description: Position around the wheel from the anchor, 0 for gate 41.

startLongitude.description: Tropical ecliptic longitude where the gate's arc begins, degrees.

endLongitude.description: Tropical ecliptic longitude where the gate's arc ends, degrees. Equals startLongitude + 5.625 (mod 360). An arc may wrap 360 (e.g. gate 25).

sign.description: The zodiac sign the arc begins in. An arc can cross a sign boundary, so the sign of endLongitude may differ.

signDegree.description: Degree within the sign where the arc begins.
